title: stachys globosa
intro: Stachys globosa, also known as Himalayan hedgehog or globular hedgehog, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Stachys globosa include relief from digestive issues, fever reduction, and improved respiratory health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing users to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
